channel.title: Cyber Case Files — Live Threat Intel
channel.description: Live CVEs, phishing alerts, breach claims, malware/APT spotlights and more.

item.title: CVE-2026-9836
item.description: IBM InfoSphere Information Server 11.7.0.0 through 11.7.1.6 is affected by an information disclosure vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-11712
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is affected by a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the administrative console help system.

item.title: CVE-2026-12085
item.description: IBM UCD - IBM UrbanCode Deploy 7.3 through 7.3.2.18 and IBM UCD - IBM DevOps Deploy 8.0 through 8.0.1.13, 8.1 through 8.1.2.6, and 8.2 through 8.2.1.0 IBM DevOps Deploy could disclose sensitive configurations and secrets to authenticated users in API responses that could be used in further attacks against the system.
